meta.note: Each item tagged: verified (primary source confirmed) | directional (credible third-party) | assumption (placeholder; needs user research). Confidence 0-10.

uk_fitness_market.claim: UK fitness sector revenue £5.7bn in 2024, +8.8% YoY; 11.5m members; penetration 16.9%; 5,607 clubs; 600m+ visits.
uk_fitness_market.source: ukactive — UK Health & Fitness Market Report 2025 (with Deloitte)
uk_fitness_market.use_in_roadmap: Demand-side tailwind. Justifies investment in offer + funnel.

london_pt_pricing.claim: London 1:1 PT 2025-26: Budget £30-£45 (PT 1to1 £30, Blueprint £35); Mid £55-£75 (Hybrid Trainer £55, MotivatePT £62, London Trainer £70, Minimal FIT £70, Workout Network £75); Premium £80-£100 (Trang £80-£90, Fitness Guru £100, No Shane No Gain Mayfair £70-£90); Elite/Specialist £95-£120+ (Trang founder £95, NRPT Mayfair £90-£100, Superprof £120).
london_pt_pricing.source: Prompt 1 deep research — synthesis of 8 named UK coach pages
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Mukund's £55 = top of Budget tier. Recommended new-client rate £85-£100 (Premium tier) per deep research.

london_pt_pricing.claim: London 12-week body-transformation packages: The Fitting Rooms £539 shared, £1,299 1:1 (6-wk); Personal Training 1to1 £2,150 (12-wk), £4,000 (6-mo); Minimal FIT Transform £2,995 (12-wk).
london_pt_pricing.source: Personal Training 1 to 1 + The Fitting Rooms + Minimal FIT (verified pages)
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Effective £700-£1,000/month for serious 12-week work is market-accepted. Mukund could productise a £2,100-£2,700 12-week in-person transformation tier.

london_pt_pricing.claim: London hybrid coaching 2025-26: Entry ~£150/4-wk (Coaching by Jess); Mid £230-£319/mo (NLFitness £230, Coaching with Halima £319); Premium £429/mo (Espinosa Physiques: 1 PT/wk + app, targets busy professionals).
london_pt_pricing.source: Espinosa Physiques + NLFitness + Coaching by Jess + Coaching with Halima
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Hybrid is a separate market product, not a discount PT. Mukund's missing tier — recommended Hybrid Light £399-£449/mo and Hybrid Signature £499-£549/mo flagship.

london_pt_pricing.claim: Affluent London professional fully-loaded fitness ecosystem: Third Space membership £245/month + 2 PT/wk × £75-£95 = £845-£1,005/month total spend.
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Defines the affluent London professional spend ceiling. Mukund's hybrid signature at £499-£549/mo is significantly under this ceiling — affordable to ICP.

london_pt_pricing.claim: London 2023: 300+ boutique fitness studios (+17.4% vs 2018); 56% of London adults within 1 mile of a boutique studio.
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Dense competitive supply but entrenched consumer demand for specialist formats. Mukund must clearly differentiate — generic London PT positioning won't survive.

london_pt_pricing.claim: Third Space (London premium chain) Apr 2025: 35,000 members across 13 London clubs, doubled footprint post-pandemic, waitlists at many clubs while preparing further expansion.
london_pt_pricing.use_in_roadmap: Strong signal that affluent Londoners are actively buying premium fitness access. Pricing power exists at the top of the market.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: ONS/Nomis 2025: UK 2.73m businesses · 241,185 small (10-49) · 44,170 medium (50-249). London: 538,320 enterprises · 41,990 small + 8,795 medium + 2,570 large = 50,785 in 10-249 target range. 25 retained accounts = 0.05% of London target market.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.source: Office for National Statistics / Nomis — UK Business 2025 + London Labour Market Profile
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: Mukund needs only 0.05% market share for 25 retained accounts — TAM is more than sufficient.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: CIPD 2025: organisations with standalone wellbeing strategy rose 44% (2020) → 57% (2025). Among 2-49 employee orgs only 21% have formal wellbeing strategy; among 50-249 it's 55%.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: Targeting cue: 50-249 firms more likely to buy structured programme; 20-49 firms more likely to buy simple pilot. Lead with 50-249 for retainers; 20-49 for one-off workshops.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: London workforce jobs: 915k professional/scientific/technical · 627k information/communication · 458k financial/insurance · 612k admin/support. Finance + Professional Services = 1.4m jobs / £186bn GVA. London = 59% of UK tech sector value (Tech Nation 2025).
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: Justifies sector ranking: Professional services > Tech > Finance/Insurance > Agencies.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: City of London SMEs: Professional services 5,220 micro / 540 small / 165 medium · Tech 1,765 / 600 / 200 · Financial 2,000 / 330 / 195 · Insurance 500 / 170 / 85.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.source: City of London — SME Landscape Report
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: Specific micro+small+medium counts per sector — direct prospecting universe for cold outreach.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: Verified corporate wellness pricing 2025-26: Webinar £250-650 (cluster £450-575) · 60-90 min workshop £650-900 · Per-employee 4-wk £165 · Monthly retainer £350-1,500/mo. NOT £2-5k as in original brief framework.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.source: Wellbeing People + Nutrition Advantage + Vital Health Nutrition + Mindful Me + Natural Alternative + Clinical & Corporate Wellbeing + Human Fitness + Work Well + GO Mammoth + Vitality + YOURZEN
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: DOWNWARD CORRECTION on retainer pricing. Lunch-and-learn / workshop entry tier well-evidenced. 4-week + 8-week pilots have weaker public pricing — bespoke selling normal.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: British Safety Council 2025: clear perception gap between what employers say they offer for wellbeing and what employees actually experience, including disparities in access.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.source: British Safety Council — Keep Thriving: Future of Workplace Wellbeing
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: People Ops buyers prioritise vendors who can show visible employee participation. Mukund's testimonial/attendance data + post-programme reports differentiate.

uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.claim: Bupa Wellbeing Index 2025: mental-health claims rose 100% in 18-35 age group from 2019 to 2024. Loneliness highlighted especially among younger workers.
uk_corporate_wellness_prompt3.use_in_roadmap: Younger workforce stat justifies hybrid + RTO + connection content angles.

uk_corporate_wellness.claim: Avg UK sickness absence 9.4 days in 2025 (up from 7.8 in 2023, 5.8 in 2022). Mental ill-health is leading long-term absence cause. UK ill-health costs £150bn/yr. 57% of employers have a wellbeing strategy (+13% since 2020). 50% of stress programmes considered effective.
uk_corporate_wellness.source: CIPD Health & Wellbeing at Work 2025 (with Simplyhealth)
uk_corporate_wellness.verified_by: WebSearch on 2026-04-26 — direct CIPD figures captured
uk_corporate_wellness.use_in_roadmap: Concrete pitch ammunition. 9.4-day absence × employee count × salary day-rate = ROI math for proposals. Note: 50% of programmes considered ineffective = clear demand for better.

uk_corporate_wellness.claim: UK corporate wellness services market £708.2m in 2026.
uk_corporate_wellness.source: IBISWorld UK Corporate Wellness Services (cited in user brief)
uk_corporate_wellness.verified_by: Cited in brief — IBISWorld is paywalled; not independently re-verified
uk_corporate_wellness.use_in_roadmap: Sufficient TAM for an independent coach. Validate before quoting in client proposals.

uk_corporate_wellness.claim: Broader UK corporate wellness USD 3.0bn in 2025; forecast USD 4.6bn by 2034.
uk_corporate_wellness.verified_by: Cited in brief — not independently verified
uk_corporate_wellness.use_in_roadmap: Wider wellbeing TAM. Supports prospecting effort.

demand_trends_prompt1.claim: ACSM 2025 global fitness trends: #3 Older-adult fitness, #4 Exercise for Weight Loss, #5 Traditional Strength, #6 HIIT, #9 Functional Fitness, #10 Wellness Coaching.
demand_trends_prompt1.use_in_roadmap: Validates Mukund's strength + weight-loss focus. Underweighted areas: longevity / older-adult / wellness coaching are top trends Mukund could lean into for differentiation.

demand_trends_prompt1.claim: HYROX 2025: 80+ global races, 550,000 athletes, 350,000 spectators (HYROX site). PUMA: 1.3m+ participants expected in 2025 season. London ExCeL = biggest HYROX event ever held.
demand_trends_prompt1.use_in_roadmap: Validates Mukund's HYROX content as the strongest organic pillar. London hosts the biggest event globally — perfect alignment with audience interest.

demand_trends_prompt1.claim: England adult activity: 63.7% active in Nov 23-24 (30m adults); 64.6% active in Nov 24-25. Growing top-of-funnel for coaching.
demand_trends_prompt1.use_in_roadmap: Active adults are more coachable than inactive — broader market in 2026 than 2024.

demand_trends_prompt1.claim: ClassPass 2024: fitness reservations +51% YoY, Pilates bookings +84%.
demand_trends_prompt1.use_in_roadmap: Premium / boutique demand strong — especially relevant to women's, mobility and longevity-adjacent positioning.

online_coaching_comps.claim: UK online coaching pricing (verified Prompt 2): TJ £299/12wk, Jamie Price £300/12wk, NKPT £399/3mo, Achieve £430/12wk, Chris Ashford £450-£525/3mo, Simon Graham £597/12wk, Sarah Louise £567-£777/12wk. £997 sits ABOVE this entire transparent UK comparison set.
online_coaching_comps.source: Prompt 2 deep research — synthesis of 7 UK coach pricing pages
online_coaching_comps.use_in_roadmap: Tier framework: Low <£450, Mid £450-£800, Premium £800-£1,500, Ultra-premium £1,500+. Mukund's £997 = Premium tier.

online_coaching_comps.claim: US/wider English-speaking online coaching: Future / Caliber ~$199-200/mo (~$600/12-wk); Trainerize examples $159-$699/mo; Gauge Girl Training $3,900-$4,350 / 12-wk custom (premium).
online_coaching_comps.use_in_roadmap: £997 = upper-mid to entry-premium against US benchmarks. Not top-of-market.

online_coaching_comps.claim: 3 named successful 12-week transformation programmes: Michelle Bridges 12WBT (Australia, 15 yrs, cohort-led, community-centred); Kaushik Bose 12-Week Body Transformation (South Asian niche, clients in 25+ countries, free 30-min clarity call entry); Matt Justice 12-Week Body Transformation (UK, 200+ clients transformed, app + weekly check-ins + monthly form review).
online_coaching_comps.source: Prompt 2 deep research — 3 verified competitor pages
online_coaching_comps.use_in_roadmap: Bose is the most relevant — South Asian niche validates Mukund's 15% verified Indian audience as a paying segment. Matt Justice is the closest UK mid-premium format. 12WBT proves cohort/community model works at scale.

funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.claim: Application forms convert at 51.6% overall (53.9% desktop, 45% mobile). All forms: 45% complete / 55% abandon.
funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.use_in_roadmap: Plan Mukund's application form for 45-55% completion. Below = friction, weak motivation, too many fields, poor mobile UX.

funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.claim: Discovery call close rates 25-40% normal (Joanna Lott Coaching uses 25% conservative). Expert CFO 10-30%. Tirion service-pro 25-40% close, 75-80% show static / 88-92% show conversational.
funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.source: Joanna Lott Coaching + Expert CFO + Tirion
funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.use_in_roadmap: 25-40% close rate = strong but realistic. Below 20% = warning. Mukund should track this from week 1.

funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.claim: Structured sales coaching can lift discovery-call close rates by 35%.
funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.use_in_roadmap: Strong case for a disciplined consultation script vs 'friendly chat'. Easy ROI — script template + practice.

funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.claim: 12-week renewal benchmarks: 30-50% renewal into continuity = reasonable; <25% = problem; >50% = strong. PT 65-70% annual retention generally (My PT Hub). 40% client loss by month 3 without retention system (Ardent GSI).
funnel_benchmarks_prompt2.use_in_roadmap: Plan for 30-50% renewal. Build a step-down £299-£349/month continuity offer to capture this.

online_coaching_comps_legacy.claim: Fitness with TJ 12-week online programme £299 (was £329); £110/mo rolling option. Includes mobile app, recipes, progressive workouts, weekly check-ins, 1:1 messenger, habit tracker. 15+ named transformation testimonials with timeframes 8-24 weeks. Hero: 'Lose the Fat. Build the Muscle. Look Better.'
online_coaching_comps_legacy.source: Fitness with TJ — Complete Body Transformation Coaching
online_coaching_comps_legacy.use_in_roadmap: Bottom anchor of UK online 12-week pricing. Mukund at £997 sits 3.3× above — premium-mid positioning consistent with 1:1 (vs TJ's app-led).

online_coaching_comps_legacy.claim: Ultimate Performance 12-week body transformation. Multiple London locations (Mayfair, Chelsea, Kensington, Knightsbridge, City, Paddington, St Paul's, Canary Wharf x2). Pricing not public. Review signal: 'not the cheapest', 'expensive', '97% of clients achieve life-changing results'.
online_coaching_comps_legacy.use_in_roadmap: Top anchor of London transformation pricing (estimated £8-15k/12wk based on review tone). Mukund's hybrid £1,797 hypothetical sits 5-10× below — significant headroom.

online_coaching_comps_legacy.claim: Enrico Argentin (Shoreditch + online). 6-week Body Transformation programme is hero (not 12-week). Online: 'first week always free'. In-person: 'first free trial session'. 4.9★/56 reviews on directory. Pricing hidden — quote-only.
online_coaching_comps_legacy.use_in_roadmap: Direct 1:1 comparator (35k followers, London, body transformation). Mukund could test (a) free-trial week as lead magnet, (b) 6-week intro pack at £497 to lower entry friction.

online_coaching_comps_legacy.claim: Hybrid Athlete Club (run by James Deag). HYROX/hybrid programme. 'Get two weeks of training free' lead magnet. Stats: 'achieve three PBs in every 8-week training block', '89% of athletes hit or exceed race target', '77% retention post-event'. Pricing hidden.
online_coaching_comps_legacy.use_in_roadmap: HYROX-niche comparator. 89%/77% are strong proof stats — Mukund needs equivalents for own programme to compete in HYROX search.

hyrox_market_prompt5.claim: UK HYROX participation grew 7,400 (2021-22) → 97,000+ (latest season). Every UK event sold out. Race entry £100+ before kit/travel. Globally: 80+ races, 550K athletes, 350K spectators in 2025.
hyrox_market_prompt5.use_in_roadmap: 13× UK growth + sold-out events validates HYROX as Mukund's strongest pillar (3 of top 6 posts). Demand >> supply in London especially.

hyrox_market_prompt5.claim: London is HYROX flagship market: London May 2025 = 12,132 athletes; London ExCeL Dec 2025 = 33,999 (biggest HYROX event ever); London Olympia Mar 2026 = 21,337; EMEA Championships London Mar 2026 = 3,905. 2024 ballot: 16K slots for 70K applicants (4.4× oversubscribed).
hyrox_market_prompt5.use_in_roadmap: London hosts multiple HYROX events with 70K+ ballot demand for 16K slots. Mukund is in the right city.

hyrox_market_prompt5.claim: HYROX age cohorts: 25-29 + 30-34 biggest, then 35-39. Range 16-75. Gender: 57% female in UK (Times). Income/occupation inferred (race £100+, premium gym memberships £159-£305/mo, Magic Circle lawyer-grade audience at Third Space).
hyrox_market_prompt5.source: HYROX DataLab 2025 + Times UK + Evening Standard
hyrox_market_prompt5.use_in_roadmap: Age 25-39 + mixed gender + urban white-collar perfectly overlaps Mukund's busy-pro target. 57% female busts 'bro-only' assumption.

hyrox_market_prompt5.claim: UK HYROX pricing tiers: Digital/community £33-£60/mo (Aaron Woodman £39.99, ONE LDN Unbeatable £33, Endurance Vault £60, Jade Skillen £1+£59); Fixed race-prep blocks £80-£149 (MARCHON £149, BOX Nutrition £149, Heather £80/8wk); Premium in-person London £280-£960/mo (Luke Kelly £280-£960; Jonno PT £500/10 sessions).
hyrox_market_prompt5.source: Prompt 5 — synthesis of 12 UK HYROX coach pages
hyrox_market_prompt5.use_in_roadmap: Three clear tiers. Mukund's recommended Hybrid Signature (£499-549/mo) sits ABOVE digital comp but BELOW Luke Kelly's premium in-person ceiling.

hyrox_market_prompt5.claim: Hybrid ecosystem partners: Gym Group (largest UK HYROX National Training Club); Third Space (London official partner); Gymbox (7 London clubs); ONE LDN (dedicated HYROX area + academy); UBX (Wembley + Kingston); F45 (global partner Mar 2026); Les Mills (group training partner Apr 2026). 14+ London gyms with HYROX classes (Apr 2024).
hyrox_market_prompt5.source: Multiple — Gym Group, Third Space, Gymbox, F45, Les Mills, ONE LDN, UBX official + Evening Standard
hyrox_market_prompt5.use_in_roadmap: Mainstream gyms commoditising HYROX-style programming. Risk: HYROX-only coaching gets squeezed; Mukund must differentiate (transformation + community, not just race prep).

creator_monetisation_prompt4.claim: Platform ranking for £997 fitness coach: 1) YouTube (trust+conversion), 2) Instagram (discovery+DM), 3) LinkedIn (corporate+executive), 4) TikTok (reach). Coaching sales > affiliate > sponsorship > native payouts.
creator_monetisation_prompt4.use_in_roadmap: Confirms platform priority. YouTube long-form is the source content; Instagram is conversion; LinkedIn opens corporate; TikTok reach only.

creator_monetisation_prompt4.claim: Native monetisation thresholds: YouTube YPP early tier 500 subs + 3 uploads/90d + 3K watch hrs/12mo OR 3M Shorts views/90d. Full ad rev: 1K subs + 4K watch hrs OR 10M Shorts views. TikTok Creator Rewards: 18+, 10K followers, 100K views/30d. First paid sponsorships: 10-50K followers + solid engagement.
creator_monetisation_prompt4.source: YouTube Help + TikTok Creator Rewards + Shopify 2026 + CreatorsJet 12,486-campaign dataset
creator_monetisation_prompt4.use_in_roadmap: Mukund at 29K IG = qualified for sponsorship by reach (micro tier 10-100K) but engagement is the gap (0.44% vs benchmark).

creator_monetisation_prompt4.claim: Named UK fitness creator funnels: Andy Griffiths £195-£255/mo online coaching (long-form authority funnel); Luke Mitchell £25.99/mo community + 6-week programme (multi-step lead-magnet funnel); Scott Laidler invitation-only online PT (consultation-led busy-professional funnel); Coach Adam James from £99/mo (calculator/tools entry funnel).
creator_monetisation_prompt4.source: Prompt 4 deep research — 4 verified UK coach pages
creator_monetisation_prompt4.use_in_roadmap: Scott Laidler is closest to Mukund's busy-pro architecture. Andy Griffiths' £195-£255 triangulates Prompt 1's premium-online tier. Adam James proves calculator-as-lead-magnet works.

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: Mukund Venkat is a former Mr. India medal holder + international men's physique pageant participant. Trajectory: Chennai → London luxury market.
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: STRONGEST unmonetised authority asset. Surface in bio + landing page hero + every sales touch. Pageant credentials are nearly impossible to fake.

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: PersonalTrainerXP runs multi-page service architecture targeting South Asian niche: NRIs/Indians Abroad, British Indians London, PCOS South Asian Women, South Asian Heart Health, Yoga+Strength for Indians, Indians in Canada. Each sub-niche has dedicated landing page.
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: Most direct strategic competitor. Proves niche supports 6+ sub-segment landing pages. Mukund could replicate (Indian Pros London + NRI Coaching + British Asian Executive Transformation).

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: RNT Fitness (Akash Vaghela) mandates MINIMUM 12-month commitment for transformation journey. Founder is British Asian targeting South Asian male transformation.
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: Proves segment commits long-term at premium. High LTV. Mukund could test 12-month renewal pathway after £997 12-week intro. Replicable founder-as-segment-member pattern (RNT Akash, Mukund Mr. India).

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: South Asian populations: disproportionately high insulin resistance + central/visceral adiposity + distinct lipid patterns (elevated triglycerides, low HDL). UK qualitative research: pervasive lack of resistance-training education + cultural diet conflicts with Western macros.
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: Hard biological grounding for the niche. Lets Mukund speak with clinical specificity (NOT medical claims) about why generic Western fitness fails the segment.

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: Platinum Training London: £2,150 / 3-Month PT · £4,000 / 6-Month Ultimate Transformation. Triangulates Prompts 1, 2, 10.
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: Re-confirms Prompt 1's London transformation tier. Mukund's £997 online at half the price of Platinum 3-month = strong value perception.

positioning_validation_prompt10.claim: Mukund currently teaches group classes at The Gym Group Walthamstow + active on Gumtree/Bark as 'Fitwithmukund'.
positioning_validation_prompt10.source: Gym Group timetable + Trustpilot + Gumtree listing
positioning_validation_prompt10.use_in_roadmap: CRITICAL OPERATIONAL RISK: budget-gym anchor + Gumtree presence psychologically contradicts £997 premium positioning. Phase out OR maintain strict brand separation between Gym Group brand and Elite £997 brand.

audience_geography_prompt9.claim: Mukund Venkat is Indian-born; studied in London; ran gyms in Chennai before becoming London-based. Profiled as 'The Body Transformer' by New Indian Express in 2016 with reference to training athletes, doctors, lawyers, designers, business owners.
audience_geography_prompt9.source: New Indian Express — The Body Transformer, 23 Apr 2016
audience_geography_prompt9.use_in_roadmap: CRITICAL — Mukund IS authentically the Indian-diaspora professional segment, not a London coach selling into it. Strongest possible authority signal for that niche. Justifies the synthesised positioning recommendation.

audience_geography_prompt9.claim: Geography estimate (low confidence): ~50-70% South Asia, ~10-20% UK/Europe, ~5-15% North America, balance other. Triangulates with own scrape: 21% verified UK / 15% verified India / 39% Unknown / 25% other in top 80 commenters.
audience_geography_prompt9.source: Prompt 9 deep research + DataReportal Instagram global stats
audience_geography_prompt9.use_in_roadmap: Both Prompt 9 and own scrape independently contradict UK-first thesis. Reasonable working assumption: ~20-30% UK, ~25-40% Indian/South Asian, balance unknown — diaspora is largest single ethnic cluster.

audience_geography_prompt9.claim: Occupation estimate (medium confidence): ~30-40% fitness/health, ~20-30% tech or finance professionals, ~10-15% other corporate, ~5-10% students/misc. Mukund's own LinkedIn explicitly targets 'executives, entrepreneurs, and leaders'.
audience_geography_prompt9.use_in_roadmap: Confirms my own scrape (19% fitness pros, 11% corporate). Heavy fitness-pro overlap = inflated engagement metrics. Real buyer audience is the 30-45% combined corporate/tech/finance share.

buyer_psychology_prompt6.claim: Buyers buy 3 things: (1) Implementation certainty (translation of advice to lifestyle), (2) Identity repair (becoming consistent person), (3) Relational safety (won't shame, gives structure without making life smaller). Working alliance has consistent moderate relationship with coaching outcomes (meta-analysis).
buyer_psychology_prompt6.use_in_roadmap: Frame all messaging around the 3 buying pillars. Working alliance signals (responsiveness, collaborative tone) directly improve outcomes.

buyer_psychology_prompt6.claim: South Asian / Indian diaspora professionals: double mismatch — generic fitness advice feels culturally tone-deaf. UK evidence: poor work-life balance, cultural appropriateness, family obligations as barriers; persistent ethnic disparities in activity; particularly low muscle-strengthening participation among Asian adults.
buyer_psychology_prompt6.source: GOV.UK ethnicity-facts-figures + Sporting Equals 2025 + UK qualitative South Asian studies
buyer_psychology_prompt6.use_in_roadmap: DIRECTLY relevant: Mukund's 15% verified Indian audience + likely diaspora overlap. Bose Fitness validates segment buys at premium. Messaging: 'fitness that fits Indian food and real family life'.

buyer_psychology_prompt6.claim: UK compliance: ASA treats before/after as testimonial-style requiring substantiation; testimonials alone NOT adequate evidence for weight-loss claims. CMA: countdown clocks/scarcity lawful only when accurate + non-pressuring. Don't promise specific fat-loss in specific timeframes.
buyer_psychology_prompt6.use_in_roadmap: All transformation imagery + testimonials need ASA-compliant captioning. Use real capacity-based urgency. No medical claims.

paid_acquisition_prompt7.claim: WordStream 2025 Meta lead benchmarks: Sports & Recreation $19.30 CPL, Health & Fitness $52.98 CPL, all-industry $27.66 CPL. UK planning band for fitness coach: £25-£45 mid CPL.
paid_acquisition_prompt7.use_in_roadmap: Use £35 CPL as Mukund's planning mid-band for Meta acquisition. Phase 1 budget £900-£1,500 = ~25-40 applications/month at this CPL.

paid_acquisition_prompt7.claim: WordStream 2025 Google Ads: Health & Fitness $62.80 CPL, $5.00 CPC. PPC Chief: London personal-services CPC £7.84 (£5.88-£10.59), London CPL ~£72. Google paid-search health/wellness landing pages convert at 4.7% median (Unbounce).
paid_acquisition_prompt7.use_in_roadmap: Google Search 'PT London' = high intent but expensive (£55-£85 CPL). Reserve for Phase 3 after warm-funnel proven.

paid_acquisition_prompt7.claim: Chili Piper form-to-meeting: 30-40% baseline (manual follow-up) vs 66.7% (instant scheduling) vs 69.2% (instant + live-call option). Mostly B2B; friction lesson transfers to coaching applications.
paid_acquisition_prompt7.use_in_roadmap: BIGGEST lever in the funnel. Instant scheduler post-application is non-negotiable. Manual follow-up costs 30-40 percentage points of conversion.

paid_acquisition_prompt7.claim: Unbounce 2024: wellness landing pages 5.1% median conversion (8.2% wellness subcategory). Instagram-paid traffic in health/wellness 7.7% median. Mobile drives ~7× traffic but desktop converts 22% better.
paid_acquisition_prompt7.use_in_roadmap: Plan visit-to-application at 5-10% (mid 8%). Mobile penalty implies short, mobile-first form is critical.

paid_acquisition_prompt7.claim: £997 offer break-even: after 15% refund/churn/failed-payment buffer = £847.45; after 3% payment processing = £817.54. Healthy paid acquisition wants substantial headroom below this.
paid_acquisition_prompt7.use_in_roadmap: Hard CAC ceiling = £817. Healthy targets: <£300/sale (warm) to <£600/sale (blended). Anything above £600/sale = funnel needs fixing.

platform_monetisation.claim: YouTube Partner Program monetisation: ads, Premium revenue, Super Chat, Shopping, memberships, BrandConnect, Super Thanks. Eligibility required.
platform_monetisation.use_in_roadmap: Treat YouTube as conversion + trust channel for first 6 months, not ad-revenue play.

tooling.claim: Apify Instagram actors: posts, profiles, photos, comments, mentions, video duration, views.
tooling.use_in_roadmap: Used for the 50-post + 80-commenter + 3-competitor pulls. Public data only.

tooling.claim: Gemini supports video understanding via Files API for files >20MB or repeated reuse.

compliance_uk.claim: ASA/CAP rules for fitness/health/transformation marketing — claims substantiated, comparable, with disclaimers; testimonials must be genuine and reflect typicality.
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: All transformation imagery + testimonials need disclaimers.

compliance_uk.claim: CAP rule 13.9 prohibits claims of precise weight/fat-loss amounts within stated period AND prohibits implying fat/weight can be lost from specific body parts (no spot reduction). 'Lose X in Y weeks' and 'belly fat' style claims are not permitted.
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: Hard rule. Audit Mukund's last 200 posts for any precise outcome claims before scaling content/ads.

compliance_uk.claim: Before/after photos = claims, not decoration. Must be genuine, permissioned, not manipulated, must not exaggerate likely results. ASA expects signed and dated proof; treats before/after photos like testimonials. A disclaimer cannot rescue an inherently misleading visual impression.
compliance_uk.source: ASA — Before and after photos guidance
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: If/when Mukund publishes before/after content: written permission + 'one client's experience, not a promise of typical results' wording adjacent to image.

compliance_uk.claim: CAP rule 15.1.1: only authorised nutrition/health claims (GB register), with same-meaning wording. CAP rule 15.6.2: NEVER imply food/supplement prevents/treats/cures disease — catches inflammation, anxiety, menopause, autism, ADHD, pain, GLP-1 equivalence, appetite suppression, blood-sugar therapeutic claims.
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: If Mukund discusses nutrition, all health-outcome claims need to be on GB register. 'Sick people are profitable' / 'ultra-processed food keeps you addicted' style framing is borderline — needs review.

compliance_uk.claim: ICO: direct messages on social media count as electronic mail under PECR. Targeted social media is direct marketing. Public social data is NOT free to reuse just because it is visible. Solicited (someone comments asking for info) ≠ unsolicited cold DM.
compliance_uk.source: ICO — Direct marketing using electronic mail + Collect information / generate leads
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: Use 'Comment X for details' (solicited) instead of cold-DM'ing public commenters. Mukund's warm-DM funnel needs solicitation upstream.

compliance_uk.claim: Health/injury/medication/menstrual/eating-history/body-composition data = special-category under UK GDPR. Lawful basis PLUS an Article 9 condition required. For direct marketing using health data: explicit consent required.
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: Mukund's application form must have separate explicit consent for health-data processing, NOT bundled with general T&Cs. Use the verbatim wording in Prompt 8 report.

compliance_uk.claim: 'Physiotherapist' and 'Dietitian' are protected titles in the UK; using a protected title without HCPC registration can be unlawful. 'Nutritionist' is generally not legally protected the same way. Coaches must not represent that they diagnose, treat or cure injuries/disease/eating disorders/medical symptoms.
compliance_uk.use_in_roadmap: Add scope-of-practice copy: 'General exercise and lifestyle coaching for healthy adults. Not physiotherapy, dietetic treatment or medical advice.'
